preconditions.init_scope: init is a local async function inside the useEffect callback; it is immediately invoked with `void init()`
preconditions.existing_fetch: Two Promise.all branches fire in sequence: incoming/outgoing kind-4 fetch, then ingestEvent pipeline, then upsertMessages
preconditions.fetchEventsWithTimeout_signature: imported from @/src/lib/ndkClient; returns Promise<{ events: Set<NDKEvent>, timedOut: boolean }>
preconditions.handleGiftWrapEvent_scope: defined as a closure inside init, called by giftWrapSub.on('event', ...); not extracted — same function handles live subscription events
preconditions.appendMessage_dedup: deduplicates by message.id — one row per rumor id regardless of inbound path

step_3b.where: after the kind-4 Promise.all resolves and before upsertMessages is called
step_3b.what: fire a second parallel fetch: fetchEventsWithTimeout(ndk, { kinds: [1059], '#p': [pubkeyHex], limit: 500 })
step_3b.parallelism: runs in parallel with the kind-4 ingest pipeline — not sequential

step_5.what: collect messages from both result sets, sort by createdAt, call upsertMessages once
step_5.ordering: must be sorted by createdAt ascending before upsertMessages so the rendered list is monotonic

kind1059_processing.handler: handleGiftWrapEvent(event, true) — skip knownMessageIdsRef dedup, rely on appendMessage id-dedup instead
kind1059_processing.unwrap: unwrapAndOpen called per event; errors silently skipped
kind1059_processing.gate: shouldIngestRumor(rumor, peerPubkeyHex) filters to the current chat's peer

upsertMessages_contract.sorting: upsertMessages does NOT sort internally — the caller must sort before calling

error_handling.unwrap_failure: try/catch in handleGiftWrapEvent body already silently skips; no change needed
error_handling.unhandled_rejection: historical path is awaited inside a Promise.all that is inside init; if init throws, it is caught by the outer try/catch in the useEffect

dependencies.story_01: parseDirectPayload must be lenient before story-03 ships (story-01 already done, verified)
dependencies.story_02: unwrapAndOpen, shouldIngestRumor, GIFT_WRAP_KIND all in scope (story-02 already done)

exports.new_exports: none — all symbols already in scope from existing imports
